protests.title: Dalan beach protest
protests.description: Local gathering as the protest movement expanded beyond Tirana.

protests.title: Durrës solidarity protest
protests.description: Local gathering as the protest movement expanded beyond Tirana.

protests.title: Elbasan solidarity protests
protests.description: Local gathering as the protest movement expanded beyond Tirana.

protests.title: Fier solidarity protest
protests.description: Several days of demonstrations continued in Tirana as the movement spread nationally.

protests.title: Gjirokastër solidarity protests
protests.description: Local gathering as the protest movement expanded beyond Tirana.

protests.title: Kakome property-rights protest
protests.description: Protesters marched to Parliament during a plenary session, called on deputies to resign and confronted an MP.

protests.title: Korçë solidarity protest
protests.description: Protesters demanded Rama's resignation and repeal of protected-area law changes; police used water cannon after a cordon was breached.

protests.title: Kukës solidarity protest
protests.description: Local gathering as the protest movement expanded beyond Tirana.

protests.title: Lezhë march
protests.description: Gathering at Dalan beach returned the demonstrations to the coast near the proposed development.

protests.title: Mërtur River dams protest
protests.description: March from Skanderbeg Square toward the prime minister's office, police station no. 3 and the Tirana Prosecutor's Office.

protests.title: Pogradec solidarity protest
protests.description: Smaller gatherings continued as the movement spread nationally.

protests.title: Rrjoll resort-site protest
protests.description: Protesters marched through central Lezhë and raised concerns about living costs, unemployment and emigration.

protests.title: Rozafa Castle protest
protests.description: Smaller gatherings continued as the movement spread nationally.

protests.title: Forty-third through forty-sixth consecutive protests
protests.description: Activists denounced public funding for a Kanye West concert alongside police action connected to online business reviews.

protests.title: Forty-second consecutive nationwide protest
protests.description: Daily demonstrations continued with demands for Rama's resignation, transitional government and police accountability.

protests.title: Concert-funding protest
protests.description: Residents and environmental activists protested a KESH project for three dams, citing inadequate consultation and environmental threats.

protests.title: Continuing daily Tirana protests
protests.description: Nationwide and diaspora protest demanding Rama's resignation, a technical government, SPAK investigations and detainee releases.

protests.title: Thirty-fifth nationwide and diaspora mobilization
protests.location: Skanderbeg Square, Dëshmorët e Kombit Boulevard and Mine Peza Street
protests.description: After the Parliament clashes, protesters marched to police station no. 3 demanding the release of detained protesters.

protests.title: Thirty-fourth consecutive protest
protests.description: Major escalation outside Parliament; police used tear gas, pepper spray and water cannon after clashes and a cordon breach.

protests.title: Parliament clashes
protests.description: Protesters gathered outside SPAK and submitted material described as evidence of state capture and unlawful development.

protests.title: Police-station solidarity march
protests.location: Police station no. 3, Mine Peza Street
protests.description: Evening protest demanded Rama's resignation and investigations into senior officials.

protests.title: SPAK protest and submission
protests.description: Protesters gathered outside Parliament, demanded government resignation and clashed with police after symbolic actions against officials.

protests.title: Regular evening protest
protests.description: Regular evening protest resumed in Skanderbeg Square and outside the prime minister's office.

protests.title: Parliament plenary-session protest
protests.description: The protest wave entered its fifth week and announced a larger mobilization for 4 July.

protests.title: Thirty-first evening protest
protests.location: Skanderbeg Square and prime minister's office
protests.description: Thirtieth consecutive protest with participation or addresses by several European political representatives.

protests.title: One-month anniversary protest
protests.description: Saturday nationwide gathering with significant diaspora participation; Italian MEP Ilaria Salis attended.

protests.title: Twenty-ninth consecutive protest
protests.description: Protesters read the movement's five-point platform and sent an official letter to Western diplomatic missions.

protests.title: Twenty-eighth consecutive nationwide protest
protests.description: Union of Trade Unions of Albania protested over wages, staffing, social dialogue, union rights and public services.

protests.title: Five-point platform protests
protests.description: Residents and emigrants protested long-running property disputes and removed sections of fencing around disputed land.

protests.title: Trade-union protest
protests.description: Largest demonstration to date, with nationwide and diaspora participation filling much of Dëshmorët e Kombit Boulevard.

protests.title: Twenty-first consecutive nationwide protest
protests.description: Daily marches continued, targeting both government and opposition; one march reached Parliament during a plenary session.

protests.title: Parliament protest
protests.description: March from Skanderbeg Square to the prime minister's office, then onto the Tirana–Durrës Highway and toward Rinas airport.

protests.title: Daily evening protests and marches
protests.description: One of the movement's largest gatherings, with strong diaspora participation and demands for Rama's resignation and anti-corruption action.

protests.title: Tirana highway and airport march
protests.description: Residents protested a separate resort project, breached fencing and entered the construction area amid tensions with police and security.

protests.title: Large Tirana diaspora-supported protest
protests.description: Larger nationwide gathering marking the League of Prizren anniversary and a broader challenge to the political system.

protests.title: Prizren 1878, Tirana 2026 nationwide gathering
protests.description: Demonstrators gathered below Rozafa Castle during Rama's visit, opposing developments at Zvërnec and Rrjoll.

protests.title: Continuing Tirana demonstrations
protests.description: Daily demonstrations in Skanderbeg Square and toward the prime minister's office, demanding transparency and increasingly Rama's resignation.

protests.title: Escalated Tirana protest
protests.description: March from the State Police Directorate to the Ministry of Interior and prime minister's office, demanding accountability and cancellation of the project.

protests.title: Daily Tirana demonstrations
protests.location: Skanderbeg Square and prime minister's office

protests.title: Vlorë solidarity protest
protests.description: Local gathering as the protest movement expanded beyond Tirana.

protests.title: Portonovo project-site protest
protests.description: Demonstration near the project site escalated into confrontations with private security; pepper spray was reported.

protests.title: Narta Lagoon and Pishë Poro–Narta beach protest
protests.description: Residents and environmental activists protested barbed-wire fencing and defended the protected Vjosa–Narta landscape.

protests.title: Akërni construction-site demonstration
protests.description: Local residents and environmental activists marched to and entered the fenced construction area, opposing works in the protected landscape.

protests.title: Melbourne solidarity protest
protests.location: Demonstrators protested the project and raised concerns over pensions, working conditions, education and youth policy.
protests.description: A large protest predominantly comprising members of the Albanian diaspora.

protests.title: Vienna protest #7
protests.description: Participants gathered in support of the protests in Albania and called for Rama's resignation.

protests.title: Vienna diaspora protest
protests.description: Rally near the Albanian Consulate under the call 'For nature, for justice, for Albania'.

protests.title: Brussels EU-quarter protest
protests.description: Large diaspora protest supporting protection of Vjosa–Narta and opposing the resort project.

protests.title: Sofia solidarity protest
protests.description: Diaspora protest held as part of wider international gatherings.

protests.title: Toronto diaspora protest
protests.description: Around 450 people gathered for a solidarity protest.

protests.title: Lyon diaspora protest
protests.description: A second consecutive gathering outside the embassy called for environmental protection, transparency and Rama's resignation.

protests.title: Berlin protest #7
protests.description: Albanian Americans from several states gathered outside UN headquarters in support of the forty-third protest in Albania.

protests.title: Berlin protest during Rama visit
protests.description: Genoa was listed among the coordinated 14 June protest locations.

protests.title: Berlin embassy protest
protests.description: Daily protests continued from Skanderbeg Square to the prime minister's office and through central Tirana.

protests.title: Cologne diaspora protest
protests.description: Participants gathered with flamingo symbols and Albanian flags.

protests.title: Düsseldorf protest during Rama visit
protests.description: Faenza was listed among the coordinated 14 June protest locations.

protests.title: Hamburg diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora members gathered outside the Albanian Embassy and called for Rama and the government to resign.

protests.title: Heidelberg diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora protest held as part of the international mobilization.

protests.title: Second Munich diaspora protest
protests.description: Participants protested outside the Albanian Embassy and called for Rama's resignation.

protests.title: Munich consulate protest
protests.description: Citizens gathered outside the Albanian Embassy in solidarity and opposed interventions in protected natural areas.

protests.title: Nuremberg diaspora protest
protests.description: Demonstrators called on the European Union to act and side with protesters in Albania.

protests.title: Stuttgart diaspora protest
protests.description: Gathering near EU headquarters supporting the Albanian protests and calling for environmental protection and transparency.

protests.title: Athens Syntagma Square protest
protests.description: Protest held under the call 'Save Vjosa-Narta'.

protests.title: Dublin diaspora protest
protests.description: Participants gathered with flags and flamingo symbols in support of the Albanian protests.

protests.title: Bologna diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora protest held as part of the international mobilization.

protests.title: Faenza planned diaspora rally
protests.description: Diaspora rally with Albanian flags and placards calling for the government's resignation.

protests.title: Florence diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora and solidarity activists opposed development near Vjosa–Narta and Zvërnec.

protests.title: Genoa planned diaspora rally
protests.description: Diaspora rally with Albanian flags and placards calling for the government's resignation.

protests.title: Milan diaspora protest
protests.description: Albanians protested against the government, carried 'Albania is not for sale' placards and called for Rama to resign.

protests.title: Pisa diaspora protest
protests.description: Several hundred people participated in the demonstration.

protests.title: Rome diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora protest held alongside the Tirana demonstrations.

protests.title: Pristina embassy solidarity protest
protests.description: Saturday nationwide and diaspora mobilization through central Tirana demanding Rama's resignation.

protests.title: The Hague diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora protest held as part of the international mobilization.

protests.title: Skopje solidarity protest
protests.description: Hundreds protested against Edi Rama and the proposed resort project.

protests.title: Second Stockholm protest
protests.description: Dozens of Albanians gathered as part of diaspora protests.

protests.title: Save Vjosa-Narta protest
protests.description: Demonstrators protested the project and raised concerns over pensions, working conditions, education and youth policy.

protests.title: Bern embassy protest
protests.description: Participants protested against Rama's government and demanded his resignation.

protests.title: Bern diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora protest against the government and Zvërnec development under the slogan 'Albania is not for sale'.

protests.title: Third London diaspora protest
protests.description: Diaspora members again protested and called for Rama's resignation.

protests.title: Second London embassy protest
protests.description: Solidarity protest listed at Macedonia Square as part of the international calendar.

protests.title: London embassy protest
protests.description: Around 2,000 people joined the protests with signs, songs and anti-government slogans.

protests.title: United Nations headquarters protest
protests.description: Diaspora protesters gathered during Rama's meeting with the North Rhine-Westphalia minister-president.

protests.title: New York consulate protest
protests.description: Diaspora members gathered outside the Albanian Embassy, opposing the resort development and calling for Rama's resignation.

protests.title: Washington embassy protest
protests.description: Participants carried Albanian flags and called for Prime Minister Edi Rama to resign.

protests.title: Waterbury diaspora protest
protests.description: Protesters confronted Rama during the Annual Conference of the Eastern Committee and called for his resignation.
